params.name: Cuneiform Tablet
params.source: CIV Master Scrolls (10.2%), Fragment Crafting (5.5%), Grandmaster Scrolls (2.1%), Lottery Machine (0.24%), Master Scrolls (1.9%), Super Species Chest (5.5%), Wishing (0.2%)
params.description:
On Nov 16, 3000 BC, Cuneiform was developed and became a common language used for business.
The Sumerian cuneiform script was written with a triangular-pointed pen made of reed stalks or wooden sticks to create different thicknesses. Later, it was known as the ancient cuneiform of the Mesopotamia.
Most of the discovered cuneiforms are written on mud slabs, while some are written on stone, metal, or wax plates. This scripts is deciphered based on Bisotun Inscriptions, which includes the Cuneiform …
